channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Curious where jazz can go beyond familiar scales? Check out …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Curious where jazz can go beyond familiar scales? Check out these essential albums from the vibrant world of microtonal jazz, where alternative tunings open entirely new sonic possibilities.
item.content:encoded: Curious where jazz can go beyond familiar scales? Check out these essential albums from the vibrant world of microtonal jazz, where alternative tunings open entirely new sonic possibilities.

item.title: Morocco was no match for France, which lost 2-0. The French,…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Morocco was no match for France, which lost 2-0. The French, one of the pre-tournament favorites, move on to the World Cup semifinals against either Spain or Belgium.
item.content:encoded: Morocco was no match for France, which lost 2-0. The French, one of the pre-tournament favorites, move on to the World Cup semifinals against either Spain or Belgium.

item.title: Mountain bike enthusiasts have been working for years on an …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Mountain bike enthusiasts have been working for years on an ambitious 485-mile, multi-use trail called The Velomont that will span the length of the state. They're making sure it's friendly for people with disabilities, particularly cyclists.
item.content:encoded: Mountain bike enthusiasts have been working for years on an ambitious 485-mile, multi-use trail called The Velomont that will span the length of the state. They're making sure it's friendly for people with disabilities, particularly cyclists.

item.title: The remaining four original Faust members have announced fou…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: The remaining four original Faust members have announced four new albums for simultaneous release; check out a track from each
item.content:encoded: The remaining four original Faust members have announced four new albums for simultaneous release; check out a track from each

item.title: In the summer of 2020, sixteen-year-old Antonio Mays Jr. tra…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In the summer of 2020, sixteen-year-old Antonio Mays Jr. traveled a thousand miles to join the racial justice movement of his generation. He arrived in Seattle during the Capitol Hill Occupied Protest, known as CHOP. Less than a week later, he was shot and killed there. The case remains unsolved.
item.content:encoded: In the summer of 2020, sixteen-year-old Antonio Mays Jr. traveled a thousand miles to join the racial justice movement of his generation. He arrived in Seattle during the Capitol Hill Occupied Protest, known as CHOP. Less than a week later, he was shot and killed there. The case remains unsolved.

item.title: The memo from the Smithsonian's secretary, Lonnie Bunch, res…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The memo from the Smithsonian's secretary, Lonnie Bunch, responded to a White House report that calls the National Museum of American History driven by "a radical, activist ideology." n.pr/4bfEYb4
item.content:encoded: The memo from the Smithsonian's secretary, Lonnie Bunch, responded to a White House report that calls the National Museum of American History driven by "a radical, activist ideology." n.pr/4bfEYb4

item.title: The story of Motown Records is quintessentially American. It…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
The story of Motown Records is quintessentially American. It’s about the American Dream, civil rights and entrepreneurship.
But that story has a special significance in the place where it all got started.
item.content:encoded:
The story of Motown Records is quintessentially American. It’s about the American Dream, civil rights and entrepreneurship.
But that story has a special significance in the place where it all got started.

item.title: The Trump EPA calls Biden-era rules for cutting pollution fr…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Trump EPA calls Biden-era rules for cutting pollution from heavy trucks "unworkable." The proposed changes have been celebrated by trucking groups and denounced by environmental groups. n.pr/4vopY1X
item.content:encoded: The Trump EPA calls Biden-era rules for cutting pollution from heavy trucks "unworkable." The proposed changes have been celebrated by trucking groups and denounced by environmental groups. n.pr/4vopY1X

item.title: Gas prices have fluctuated since the U.S. and Israel launche…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Gas prices have fluctuated since the U.S. and Israel launched a war on Iran, which disrupted shipping through the Strait of Hormuz and left consumers unsure of what they'll pay at the pump. n.pr/4ffOUmm
item.content:encoded: Gas prices have fluctuated since the U.S. and Israel launched a war on Iran, which disrupted shipping through the Strait of Hormuz and left consumers unsure of what they'll pay at the pump. n.pr/4ffOUmm

item.title: Who’s Really ‘Not Country Enough’? The War and Treaty Have S…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Who’s Really ‘Not Country Enough’? The War and Treaty Have Some Ideas

The husband-and-wife duo have watched in amazement as artists who make pop-heavy country are, unlike them, embraced by country radio.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
Who’s Really ‘Not Country Enough’? The War and Treaty Have Some Ideas

The husband-and-wife duo have watched in amazement as artists who make pop-heavy country are, unlike them, embraced by country radio.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: Inspired by diving birds, roboticists built the lightweight …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Inspired by diving birds, roboticists built the lightweight machines to move from water to air. The design may one day lead to robots that can monitor and sample the coastal ocean. n.pr/3R9lgaf
item.content:encoded: Inspired by diving birds, roboticists built the lightweight machines to move from water to air. The design may one day lead to robots that can monitor and sample the coastal ocean. n.pr/3R9lgaf

item.title: The boycott of the 1966 tournament stemmed from FIFA’s unwil…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
The boycott of the 1966 tournament stemmed from FIFA’s unwillingness to give the continent at least one guaranteed spot in the 16-team draw. For comparison, Europe and South America had a combined 14 automatic bids.

via GBH
item.content:encoded:
The boycott of the 1966 tournament stemmed from FIFA’s unwillingness to give the continent at least one guaranteed spot in the 16-team draw. For comparison, Europe and South America had a combined 14 automatic bids.

via GBH

item.title: Album of the Day: MAQUINA., "BODY TRANSMISSION." The Portugu…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Album of the Day: MAQUINA., "BODY TRANSMISSION." The Portuguese band's fusion of krautrock and industrial oozes warehouse-ready debauchery.
item.content:encoded: Album of the Day: MAQUINA., "BODY TRANSMISSION." The Portuguese band's fusion of krautrock and industrial oozes warehouse-ready debauchery.

item.title: New plaintiffs in a lawsuit against Elon Musk's SpaceXAI and…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: New plaintiffs in a lawsuit against Elon Musk's SpaceXAI and Stability AI say the companies' AI tools were used to make sexually explicit images of them as children. n.pr/4wu1xkr
item.content:encoded: New plaintiffs in a lawsuit against Elon Musk's SpaceXAI and Stability AI say the companies' AI tools were used to make sexually explicit images of them as children. n.pr/4wu1xkr

item.title: The U.S. Military is Almost Out of Money (or So They Say) P…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
The U.S. Military is Almost Out of Money (or So They Say)

Pentagon sources told NBC News that the military may start “parking jets and turning off exercises” if Congress doesn't give them more money.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. Military is Almost Out of Money (or So They Say)

Pentagon sources told NBC News that the military may start “parking jets and turning off exercises” if Congress doesn't give them more money.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: France and Morocco will take the field at 4 p.m. for a quart…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
France and Morocco will take the field at 4 p.m. for a quarterfinals game in Foxborough, Mass. that's also a rematch of the 2022 World Cup semifinals.

via WBUR
item.content:encoded:
France and Morocco will take the field at 4 p.m. for a quarterfinals game in Foxborough, Mass. that's also a rematch of the 2022 World Cup semifinals.

via WBUR

item.title: How many releases have you added to your collection in 2026?…
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)
item.description:
How many releases have you added to your collection in 2026?

From Record Store Day releases to new albums to reissues from triangle-worshipping, microtonal-looping, polka-dotted space beings, these are the best-selling releases so far.
https://disc.gs/4pc3VtU
item.content:encoded:
How many releases have you added to your collection in 2026?

From Record Store Day releases to new albums to reissues from triangle-worshipping, microtonal-looping, polka-dotted space beings, these are the best-selling releases so far.
https://disc.gs/4pc3VtU

item.title: Competitive calisthenics are on the rise. “Is the momentum …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Competitive calisthenics are on the rise.

“Is the momentum picking up? Absolutely,” says Cristian Lema, a judge and competitor. “Is it gonna be colossal and thunderous? Absolutely. How long is it gonna take? Shorter than you think.”

Story: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...
item.content:encoded:
Competitive calisthenics are on the rise.

“Is the momentum picking up? Absolutely,” says Cristian Lema, a judge and competitor. “Is it gonna be colossal and thunderous? Absolutely. How long is it gonna take? Shorter than you think.”

Story: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...

item.title: Korean zithers, plumbing pipes, water glasses and singing sa…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Korean zithers, plumbing pipes, water glasses and singing saws — these are just some of the rare and unusual instruments you'll hear on this episode. Look for Tiny Desk Radio on your local NPR station. n.pr/4vZNnry
item.content:encoded: Korean zithers, plumbing pipes, water glasses and singing saws — these are just some of the rare and unusual instruments you'll hear on this episode. Look for Tiny Desk Radio on your local NPR station. n.pr/4vZNnry

item.title: What If ‘The Wizard of Oz’ Involved Having Sex With Jon Hamm…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
What If ‘The Wizard of Oz’ Involved Having Sex With Jon Hamm?

'Gail Daughtry and the Celebrity Sex Pass' is a story of courage, friendship and a quest to fuck the star of 'Mad Men,' not necessarily in that order.

REVIEW: www.rollingstone.com/tv-movies/tv...
item.content:encoded:
What If ‘The Wizard of Oz’ Involved Having Sex With Jon Hamm?

'Gail Daughtry and the Celebrity Sex Pass' is a story of courage, friendship and a quest to fuck the star of 'Mad Men,' not necessarily in that order.

item.title: A Black teenager was killed at a BLM protest in Seattle in 2…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A Black teenager was killed at a BLM protest in Seattle in 2020. Why is his death still unsolved? And who should be held accountable? NPR’s Embedded podcast investigates. Listen: npr.org/CHOP
item.content:encoded: A Black teenager was killed at a BLM protest in Seattle in 2020. Why is his death still unsolved? And who should be held accountable? NPR’s Embedded podcast investigates. Listen: npr.org/CHOP

item.title: Many older adults navigate aging on their own — without chil…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Many older adults navigate aging on their own — without children or a spouse. An expert says this is "a reality to be supported" rather than a crisis to be solved. n.pr/4eVivm8
item.content:encoded: Many older adults navigate aging on their own — without children or a spouse. An expert says this is "a reality to be supported" rather than a crisis to be solved. n.pr/4eVivm8

item.author: NME Home - Music, Film, TV, Gaming & Pop Culture News [Unoffici… (@nme.com.web.brid.gy)
